class.name: FileWatcher
class.brief_description: Provides methods for watching files and directories.
class.description: Listens to files and directories, and dispatches events to notify listeners of changes to files and directories.

method.name: add_watch
method.description: Adds a watch for [param directory]. On success, returns a positive [int] that can be used in [method remove_watch_by_id]; otherwise, returns a [enum WatcherError]. If [param recursive] is [code]true[/code], the subdirectories within the [param directory] will be automatically watched recursively. File change events in the directory will be listened to and handled by [param listener]. [b]Note:[/b] For directories where watches are added automatically, it is still possible to add watches manually.

method.name: create
method.description: Attempts to create and return an OS-specific file watcher instance. [b]Note:[/b] Returns [code]null[/code] if the file watcher is not implemented on the host platform.

method.name: get_watch_directories
method.description: Returns a list of directories that were manually added for watching.

method.name: poll_events
method.description: Used to poll events in the main thread. [b]Note:[/b] This only works in builds where threading support is not enabled.

method.name: remove_watch_by_id
method.description: Removes the directory watch specified by [param watch_id], which was previously returned by [method add_watch].

method.name: stop_watch
method.description: Stops the background watching thread. [b]Note:[/b] This does not clear the added watches.

method.name: watch
method.description: Starts watching. [b]Note:[/b] If threading support is enabled in the build, this will be executed in a separate thread; otherwise, it will also need to call the [method poll_events] method periodically.

members.member: Whether to allow symlinks to watch recursively out of the manual watched directory. [member follow_symlinks] must be enabled for this to work.
When enabled, consecutive [constant FileListener.ACTION_MODIFIED] events for the same file within a single event batch will be merged into a single callback to reduce overhead.
Whether to allow recursive watchers to follow symbolic links to other directories. [b]Note:[/b] Directories manually added by `[method add_watch]` are not subject to this property.
Whether to skip file system checks on recursive subdirectories. [b]Note:[/b] Enable to skip checks if you are certain that different file systems are not mounted under the directories being watched.

constants.constant: The FileWatcher is not yet available.
The file listener being used is invalid.
The directory to be watched does not exist or is inaccessible.
The directory to be watched lacks read permissions.
The directory to be watched has already been manually added for watching.
The directory to be watched is in a unsupported file system.
File system watcher failed to watch for changes.
The symlink points outside the allowed watch scope.
